Gate C (South-West).accessibility: Equipped with wide accessible ramps and dedicated elevator access.

amenities.elevators: Located near Gate C and Section 114.
amenities.first_aid: Medical stations active at Sections 108, 224, and 316.
amenities.sustainability_eco_bins: Green recycling & compost pods situated at every food plaza. Fans earn points by scanning the bin's tournament QR code.

transit_hub.trains: Direct rail transit service departing to Secaucus Junction every 8-10 minutes post-match.
transit_hub.rideshare: Designated Uber/Lyft pickup point operational exclusively at Parking Lot E.
transit_hub.shuttles: Free accessible shuttle loops running continuously between Lot P and Gate C.
